tags.description:

tags.name: Canine Corners Dog Park at Elliot Park
tags.note: Membership, visible Canine Corners tag, is REQUIRED of all dogs using the park, & must be renewed each calendar year. Owners are subject to fines for non-compliance w/ user fees or park rules, according to District Ordinance Section 11.03
